title: Mutual Friends & A Comeback 🤝
excerpt: Added two revolutionary updates and we are back on Chrome.
body: Recently, Friends Remover was hit hard by the removal of our extension. After weeks of rebuilding and improving, we're finally back—and stronger than ever. This may be our biggest update yet, bringing massive new features, major improvements, and countless bug fixes. We hope you enjoy this update, as it may be our last major update for a while. Thank you to everyone who continued to support Friends Remover throughout this journey. We couldn't have made this comeback without you.

added.text: Special welcome messages in popup menu
added.moreInfo: Displays custom welcome messages for FR+ users when opening the popup.

added.text: Flagged filter for users flagged by Rotectors API
added.moreInfo: You can now filter by 'flagged' in the popup.
Recommends friends you should pin based on how long you've been friends and mutual connections.
Shows shared friends between users in Compact Viewer.
FR+ is now 115 Robux per month subscription.
Users must enter an email for verification.
Users must accept terms before purchase.
Protects account from misuse of mass friend removal.
Shows how long you've been friends with a user.

removed.text: Notify if a Friend Removes You is no longer Plus-only

fixed.moreInfo: No longer forces mobile layout on resize.
Buttons now properly disable during loading.
Pinned users cannot be removed accidentally.
Shows proper error instead of success.

improved.moreInfo: Auto enables performance mode for 400+ friends.

other.text: Block Mode is now exclusive to FR+ members
Scheduled Removals are now exclusive to FR+ members
Massive performance improvements throughout the entire extension
Dozens of community-reported bugs have been fixed
Large friends lists now perform significantly better than before
